Dispute level 2: multiple significant translation options.
πνεῦμα — "spirit" vs. "Spirit." Capitalization is a theological decision, not a grammatical fact. Greek has no capital letters.

πίστις — "faith" (subjective trust) vs. "faithfulness" (objective reliability). "Faith of Christ" (G1342 Χριστοῦ) may mean trust IN Christ or the faithfulness OF Christ.
